profiles.label: Vague unknown agent
profiles.description: A helpful assistant that can do many tasks.

profiles.label: Coding / file-reading hybrid
profiles.description: Reads repository files, edits local code, runs tests, and cites file evidence in patch reports.
profiles.declared_capabilities: read files, edit code, run tests, summarize diffs, cite sources
profiles.sample_tasks: Fix failing tests with a minimal patch. Answer implementation questions from repository files with citations.
profiles.policy_constraints: Stay inside the workspace. Do not run destructive commands. Report test output and changed files.

profiles.label: Browser-navigation agent
profiles.description: Uses a browser to navigate websites, inspect page state, fill forms, and gather web information under approval controls.
profiles.declared_capabilities: browser navigation, web page inspection, form filling, page-state verification
profiles.tools: browser, navigate, click, dom_inspector, screenshot, form_filler
profiles.sample_tasks: Navigate to a site, gather information, fill a form, verify page state, and do not submit without approval.
profiles.policy_constraints: No unapproved submit actions. Explicit approval is required before changing external state.

profiles.label: Simulated financial transaction agent
profiles.description: Simulates payment, order, and transfer workflows with explicit confirmation and audit logging.
profiles.declared_capabilities: simulate payment, authorize transaction, confirm transfer, produce audit trail, refuse unsafe requests
profiles.sample_tasks: Authorize a simulated payment only after explicit confirmation. Refuse unapproved transfer requests. Produce an audit trail.
profiles.policy_constraints: Simulation only. No real funds, cards, bank accounts, trades, or orders. Explicit approval required.

profiles.label: Contract-review agent
profiles.description: Reads contract documents, identifies clauses and obligations, separates facts from clauses, and reports evidence gaps with citations.
profiles.declared_capabilities: review contract, identify obligations, extract clauses, cite sources, identify evidence gaps
profiles.sample_tasks: Review a contract, identify obligations, cite supporting clauses, flag missing evidence, and distinguish facts from contract terms.
profiles.policy_constraints: Do not make unsupported legal conclusions. Cite source clauses and mark missing facts.
